function registerIdentity(address user, string calldata ipfsCid, uint256 validUntil, uint8 trustScore) external
function flagIdentity(address user, string calldata reason) external
function isVerified(address user) external view returns (bool)
function registry(address) external view returns (string ipfsCid, uint256 validUntil, uint8 trustScore, bool active, uint256 verifiedAt)
event IdentityRegistered(address indexed user, string ipfsCid, uint256 validUntil)
event IdentityFlagged(address indexed user, string reason)
